feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Forecast Order in SAP Business One best practice
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Our dealers have submitted a forcast of their annual quantities. I would like to store these articles with their respective quantities in SAP Business One and was thinking of the sales blanket agreement.
Unfortunately, the quantities are then not visible to the purchasing department. Because they are not displayed as confirmed quantities.

Furthermore, I realised in my test system that the price defined in the framework is still given even though the planned quantity has been called off.

Have I forgotten a tick somewhere? How would you proceed?

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: I want 5 warehouses to be added while creating item master in SAP B1 SQL
entry.content:
I want 5 warehouses to be added while creating item master in SAP B1 SQL

This contains the selective list of warehouses that should be added in item master while creating new master

entry.title: Estrutura de produtos
entry.content:
Bom dia a todos.

Em nosso processo de Injeção Plástica reaproveitamos as peças refugadas geradas durante a operação.

Estas peças, depois de moídas, voltam ao processo em substituição a MP original

Ao tentar incluir esta condição na estrutura dos produtos acabados, é exibido a a mensagem "Item já definido em um nível superior na estrutura do produto [Estrutrua de produtos -  Componente - Código do componente] ... [Mensagem 3566-12]", não permitindo a gravação.

Entendo que é uma regra do sistema, pois estou usando como componente, um item que já faz parte da estrutura em algum momento, mas é uma condição do nosso processo.

Agradeço a colaboração de todos que puderem.

entry.title: B1 Service Layer - Update Order Discount
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using the SAP B1 Service layer to update a sales order that already has a discount applied. When I try and pass through a new 'DiscountPercent', I am receiving the following error:
'[ORDR.DiscSum] , 'Field cannot be updated'

Is there a workaround for this so I can update sales orders that have total discounts applied?

Cheers.

entry.title: Issue while Calling JSON REST API from B1iF 2.0
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am developing a scenario on B1iF 2.0 for Calling 3rd party Rest API from B1iF 2.0 with Json format.

So, the step is that first we have to generate the token and pass the token while calling other API like Item Master or Customer Master.

We are able to get the token and passing the same on another http call.

When we are using 2nd HTTP Call adapter and passing the payload that time it's give us the error like 

com.sap.b1i.bizprocessor.BizProcException: BPE003 Type conversion to XML failed

Below is the payload we are using.

Below is http adapter setting

Regards,

Tushar Nathvani

entry.title: SAP B1 - Italy Localization configuration guide for 10.0
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

We are planning to implement SAP B1 Italy localization for one of our Indian customer with manufacturing plant in Italy.

I would like to seek help related to Italian localization specific configuration for 10.0 FP 2311 version.

I could able to check the documentation for 9.3 but not sure about the latest legal changes in Italy recently.

Can somebody provide latest document & with sandbox details for intermediatory?

#italian

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA 

Best regards

Anand

entry.title: After migrating 10.0 FP 2208 can not connect with Jasper Reports.
entry.content:
Hi all,

We had Jasper Reports running correctly. After migrating to version 10.0 and the security changes in the SQL that this version produces, we were unable to connect to said report generator.

This is the error:

"com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: The driver could not establish a secure connection to SQL Server with Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) encryption. Error: "No appropriate protocol (protocol is disabled or cipher suites are inappropriate)."

The Driver and the JDBC url is the same:

com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver

jdbc:sqlserver://192.168.Y.XXX:1433;databaseName=TEST

It is evident that something has been activated or deactivated in the database in the sql that denies or rejects the connection.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Alert on UDF B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I made a UDF in the item master data to register BBD on products. Now I want to set an alert 2 months before the expiration date. SAP Business One 

Who can help me?

 

Regards Mark Oenema

entry.title: SAP B1 Service layer API for Goods Return Requests
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

May I know if there is service layer API for Goods Return Requests?

 

 

Thank you in Advance

entry.title: Adding Expiry Date Column to Batch Selection Screen in Customer Checkout
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I have a requirement to add an extra column of expiry date to the batch selection screen from B1 of Sap Customer Checkout through a plugin.

Kindly note that we are working with the SAP Customer Checkout version 2.0 FP17.

To develop the new feature, I have planned to build a new screen for the batch selection.

Here is where I trigger the event (for popup new screen) for selecting the batch number from the CCO backend.

@PluginAt(pluginClass = ManagedByBatchOrSerialNumberPosService.class, method = "fetchBatchOrSerialNumbers", where = POSITION.BEFORE)

               public void checkBatchItem(Object proxy, Object[] args, StackTraceElement caller) {

                              JSONObject payLoad = new JSONObject();

                              payLoad.put("type", "event");

                              payLoad.put("eventName", "EXTEND_EXPIRY_DATE_EVENT");

                              //adding event payload data article id, quantity and stock location

                              BroadcasterHolder.INSTANCE.getBroadcaster().broadcastActionForPath("/ws/tech", "plugin", payLoad);

                              logger.info("--------------------------------------------------------");

               }

Here is the JS code for listening to the event. 

this.eventBus.subscribe({
			'handleEvent': (event) =>{
				if(event.getType() == "EXTEND_EXPIRY_DATE_EVENT"){
					const payLoad = event.getPayload();
					console.log(payLoad);
					const popupConfig = {
						//popup configurations
}
					
					this.eventBus.push('SHOW_GENERIC_POPUP', popupConfig);
					
				}

			}
		});
	}

And these are also a work fine. But the main problem is

  1. Where should I set the batch number to show in the previous menu (Where to return the batch number)?
  2. Showing data on the newly created menu?

I have created a separate scenario package for retrieving the data including the expiry date. 

Here is the output of the scenario package.

<CheckNumberReturn>
    <Row>
        <BatchNr>BATCH001</BatchNr>
        <MnfDate/>
        <ExpDate>2022-04-30 00:00:00.0</ExpDate>
        <Quantity>38</Quantity>
    </Row>
    <Row>
        <BatchNr>BATCH002</BatchNr>
        <MnfDate/>
        <ExpDate>2022-04-30 00:00:00.0</ExpDate>
        <Quantity>22</Quantity>
    </Row>
</CheckNumberReturn>

Your valuable guidance, articles, or documents related to solving these problems are greatly appreciated.

Thank You.!

Best Regards,

Ashen.

entry.title: Sales report for customers and items
entry.content: I believe the built in sales analysis report by customer and item doesn’t include service credit notes, how can I get these figures, do I need to run a query?

entry.title: SBO_SP_TransactionNotification
entry.content:
Is it possible to make blocking in SBO_SP_TransactionNotification only work in the Data Transfer Workbench? 

SAP Business One

entry.title: Is it Possible to insert data, when AR Invoice is Added manually/through DI API in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an Requirement to Insert the AR Invoice Data to a Table When an AR Invoice is added manually/through DI API in sap b1. How to handle this.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Sap B1 Hana SP 2402 Registering B1WebServer into SLD returned error
entry.content:
Hello,

I am encountering an issue with SAP Business One HANA SP 2402 where I receive an error stating "Registering B1WebServer into SLD returned error" while attempting to register the B1WebServer in the Service Layer Directory (SLD). What steps can I take to resolve this issue? Has anyone else faced this during installation and found a solution?

Details:

  • Running on SAP Business One HANA SP 2402
  • The error occurs during the installation phase
  • SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP3

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Financial Template Import Wizard
entry.content: I need to know with examples how to import a "Financial Template" using the "Financial Template Import Wizard" as there are no references, videos or documentation for this feature and I need it for one of my customers.

entry.title: Import from Excel_Business Partner master data_Bank
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I tried to import from Excel with the template including Bank info. But the error with the bank information. I can add a new record without bank info.
Please help me to check it. The bank info contains the predefined info.

entry.title: ServiceLayer query allowlist for UDT/UDO
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

 

 

I have a problem with the allowlist from the query service layer. For example, if I want to post the following query:



{
"SqlCode": "U_CS_PROD5",
"SqlName": "U_CS_PROD5",
"SqlText": "SELECT T0.Code FROM [@CS_BDE_MAIN] T0"

}


Then I get the response:

{
"error": {
"code": 702,
"message": {
"lang": "en-us",
"value": "Table '@CS_BDE_MAIN' not accessible"
}
}
}

 

 


I defined the table in the allowlist like this:

First test:
@CS_BDE_MAIN
Second test:
[@CS_BDE_MAIN]
Third test
CS_BDE_MAIN

Afterwards I always restarted the service layer.

However, I still get the same error message.

Do you have any idea what that could be?


Thank you very much

Levin

entry.title: SAP B1 on Hana - Dirty Read - Service Layer Analytical view
entry.content:
Hi guys, we have the following scenario:

- We create a Analytical view and expose it on service layer.

- The view exposed is used by a third party app to read the jornals entries.

We detect than the view exposes non commited journal lines . It means than, if you consume the endpoint during a database transaction (posting a large jornal for example), some journals can are present unbalanced (some lines are not showen).

We test this scenario over an UDT, and we found the same behavior.

Could someone tell me how to avoid dirty reading in a view (or analytical view) HANA 2.0?

Regards,

 

Gustavo

entry.title: SAP Business One Matching Criteria in Bank Statment Processing
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a query, I have a scenrio with SAP Business One Bank Statment Processing.

Let's say I have a balance of 100 in the incoming payments, the system automatically populates all the AR Invoices/Incoming Payments open documents which have a balance of 100. Now to avoid manually selecting as per going through the bank statement. I want the system to automatically select the AR Invoice/Incoming Payment which is there in the bank statement line item. I have worked with Matching Criteria only the Balance Amount is working and the rest is not. 

Any inputs.

With Regards,

Samudra Gupta

entry.title: Duplicate business partner authorization
entry.content: SAP Business One should have authorization for the 'Duplicate Business Partner' option. Just like 'Duplicate documents and records' authorization.
